meta.description: A harvested web page — stores URL, content, and provenance metadata to enable future sync

harvestedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this page was fetched

harvestSkill.description: UUID of the Skill item used to harvest this page

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_36ea658e_3577_4748_bca5_349789174df8" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "url" TEXT,
    "title" TEXT,
    "harvested_at" TIMESTAMPTZ,
    "harvest_skill" UUID,
    "content" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_36ea658e_3577_4748_bca5_349789174df8" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_36ea658e35774748_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
